nasb.text: Then the men of Israel turned, and the men of Benjamin were terrified; for they saw that disaster was close to them.

esv.text: Then the men of Israel turned, and the men of Benjamin were dismayed, for they saw that disaster was close upon them.

cnv.text: 那時，以色列人又轉身回來，便雅憫人就非常驚慌，因為看見災禍臨到自己身上了。

ccb.text: 以色列人转身杀了回来，便雅悯人大惊失色，知道大祸临头了。
